meaning: 三维空间中定义一个点的图象信息的单位
examples: Volume data segmentation is the premise of voxel modeling.
It goes beyond 2-d raster formats to include voxel, or 3-d, raster format.
Methods: White matter density was compared among three groups by voxel-based morphometry.
Each bit of each object in the arena must be triangulated continuously, so that the computer can keep track of which voxel it is in.
